metadata.description: OMP enhancement plugins for config assets, writing support, and test workflow support.

plugins.name: omp-config
plugins.description: Pluginized OMP configuration assets, agents, skills, hooks, model override templates, and config diagnostics.

plugins.name: writing-helper
plugins.description: Standalone OMP writing helper with logic checks, quality checks, citation verification, writer/checker agents, and writing skills.

plugins.name: omp-testing-enhancer
plugins.description: Help OMP agents write and check tests with target analysis, public API context, browser evidence, coverage and mutation analyzers, quality gates, and reports.
